case_title: MICHAEL CASSIDY VS. WALTER B UMANA ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,300.00 FILED BY CASSIDY, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT UMANA, WALTER B UMANA, RONALD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. (2) DEFENDANTS ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ARE ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER ALVIN BARAHONA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASSIDY, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UMANA, WALTER B UMANA, RONALD $6,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,405.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
(SC220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED (1ST OF 2 REQUESTS) FILED BY DEFENDANT UMANA, RONALD
(SC220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED (2ND OF 2 REQUESTS) FILED BY DEFENDANT UMANA, WALTER B

ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS [X] THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED AND THE COURT ORDERS: [X] PAYMENTS OF $200.00 ON THE 2ND DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING JANUARY 02, 2015 UNTIL AUGUST 02, 2017 AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT $ 205.00. [X] THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS THE SAME AS THE JUDGMENT. IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, NO INTEREST WILL BE OWED ON THE JUDGMENT, AND THE JUDGMENT WILL BE PAID IN FULL.

ORDER (SC-225) ORDER ON DECLARATION OF DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS: THE COURT PAYMENT ORDER REFERRED TO [X] IS TERMINATED AND THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT IS COLLECTIBLE

SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO WALTER UMANA
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED ON SUBPOENA ISSUED ON FEB-20-2015 FOR WALTER UMANA.(RETURNED WITHOUT ORIGINAL SUBPOENA)- FEE FOR SERVICE $ 72.50
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED ON SUBPOENA ISSUED ON FEB-20-2015 FOR RONALD UMANA.(RETURNED WITHOUT ORIGINAL SUBPOENA)- FEE FOR SERVICE $ 98.50

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2015 IS CONTINUED BY ORDER OF THE COURT TO APR-23-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR WAS PRESENT. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR WALTER UMANA WAS PRESENT. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR RONALD UMANA WAS NOT PRESENT. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR RONALD UMANA IS ORDERED PRESENT THROUGH JUDGMENT DEBTOR WALTER UMANA AND THROUGH THIS NOTICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2015 IS CONTINUED BY ORDER OF THE COURT TO APR-23-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR WAS PRESENT. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR WALTER UMANA WAS PRESENT. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR RONALD UMANA WAS NOT PRESENT. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR RONALD UMANA IS ORDERED PRESENT THROUGH JUDGMENT DEBTOR WALTER UMANA AND THROUGH THIS NOTICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MORGAN PRICKETT. FILED BY CASSIDY, MICHAEL UMANA, WALTER B

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. "JUDGMENT SATISFIED IN FULL $6,405 IN CASH AND CASHIERS CHECK IN COURT 4/23/15", PER PRO TEM JUDGE MORGAN PRICKETT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT RONALD UMANA WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MORGAN PRICKETT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. "JUDGMENT SATISFIED IN FULL $6,405 IN CASH AND CASHIERS CHECK PAID IN COURT 4/23/15", PER PRO TEM JUDGE MORGAN PRICKETT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT RONALD UMANA WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MORGAN PRICKETT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
